title: cyclophorus laevis
intro: Cyclophorus laevis is a species of airplant, a type of epiphyte that belongs to the Tillandsia family, native to Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, with its health benefits attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Cyclophorus laevis can be prepared as a herbal remedy, often in the form of a tea or infusion, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
